Extends ArcanistConfiguration, manages workflows, and includes PHP classes for linting integration.

## Folders
- **[config](config/README.md)**: Extends ArcanistConfiguration, manages workflows, and includes JSON cache and library registration files.
- **[linting](linting/README.md)**: PHP classes for Cppcheck and cpplint integration, Phutil library registration, and firmware linting scripts.
